title: odontonema bracteolatum
intro: Odontonema bracteolatum, also known as Mexican firecracker, is a flowering plant native to Mexico and Central America. It is a shrubby perennial herb with vibrant red and green foliage, producing clusters of small white flowers. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Odontonema bracteolatum include relief from fever, colds, and respiratory issues, and it can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for consumption.
